rationale: Clean Stage F1 implementation: a single `EvidenceAssemblyTelemetry` type is threaded into both review (overflow / transport / success paths) and grading (overflow / runtime-error / parse-error / success paths), and a compact `EventBodySummary` is appended via `appendEventSummary` on every relevant event in the loop. Tests cover the §15 artifact shape, the §16 event summary on all three event kinds, the explicit "no per-section detail on event body" invariant, and the store cap. Additive-only schema changes preserve consumer compatibility per the bead's rollback contract.
